text:
"sya believes in draws" challenge is over ⭐

Last day result: 2/6 (+$1.28)
*🇩🇿 Algeria vs. 🇦🇹 Austria finished 3-3, Polymarket just had a UI bug.

Total PnL: -$22.28
Total result: 7/28 draws

Let’s be real, that’s actually not bad!
And if I had started from the first group stage day, this could’ve ended in profit.

Worth trying, hope you enjoyed the challenge with me 🤓

"sya believes in draws" challenge DAY 5 ⭐ (FINAL ONE)

Day 4 result: 2/6 (+$1.51)
Total PnL: -$23.56

Today's matches:
> 🇵🇦Panama vs. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿England - draw @ 10c
> 🇨🇩DR Congo vs. 🇺🇿Uzbekistan - draw @ 24c
> 🇩🇿Algeria vs. 🇦🇹Austria - draw @ 47c (WTF?!)
> 🇭🇷Croatia vs. 🇬🇭Ghana - draw @ 31c
> 🇨🇴Colombia vs. 🇵🇹Portugal - draw @ 25c
> 🇯🇴Jordan vs. 🇦🇷Argentina - draw @ 10c

3/6 today might be enough to finish this challenge in profit 😶‍🌫️

World Cup is always about dreams coming true

So that’s why I’m backing Cape Verde (4.3c) to become the Group H winner today.

If Uruguay somehow beat Spain 1-0, Cape Verde only need to win by 2 goals to top the group.

Not a serious prediction, just +$225 if the miracle happens 🇨🇻

"sya believes in draws" challenge DAY 4 ⭐

Day 3 result: 2/6
Total PnL: -$25.07

Could’ve been better, but Ecuador surprised us yesterday 😶‍🌫️

Today's matches:
> 🇪🇬Egypt vs. 🇮🇷Iran - draw @ 37c
> 🇨🇻Cape Verde vs. 🇸🇦Saudi Arabia - draw @ 29c
> 🇺🇾Uruguay vs. 🇪🇸Spain - draw @ 27c
> 🇳🇴Norway vs. 🇫🇷France - draw @ 18c
> 🇸🇳Senegal vs. 🇮🇶Iraq - draw @ 14c
> 🇳🇿New Zealand vs. 🇧🇪Belgium - draw @ 12c

We need at least 3/6 today, which ones will it be?

I’ll make $230 if Erling Haaland doesn’t score today 🇳🇴

Feels like a good play with Norway expected to rotate heavily.

They’re already in the playoffs, so there’s no reason to risk key players here. https://t.co/hROaKV6IVi

Morning routine: claiming profit from WC combo.

4/4 predictions played out perfectly.

Turned $30 into $114 just by having fun watching football 😋 https://t.co/mGvgN5Egqi

This trader’s first prediction was that Germany WON’T WIN against Ecuador

And as you can see, he cashed out big.

+$2,239,379 on just one game, wow..

Backing underdogs at this World Cup is +EV 👀 https://t.co/XvuIuyDyvW

"sya believes in draws" challenge DAY 3 ⭐

Day 2 result: 0/6
Total PnL: -$23.08

Ouch..got cooked asf yesterday.

Today's matches:
> 🇯🇵Japan vs. 🇸🇪Sweden - draw @ 28c
> 🇪🇨Ecuador vs. 🇩🇪Germany - draw @ 19.8c
> 🇵🇾Paraguay vs. 🇦🇺Australia - draw @ 43c
> 🇨🇼Curaçao vs. 🇨🇮Côte d'Ivoire - draw @ 11.6c
> 🇹🇷Türkiye vs. 🇺🇸United States - draw @ 23c
> 🇹🇳Tunisia vs. 🇳🇱Netherlands - draw @ 9c

Crazy that Paraguay & Australia are scared to win💀

How many out of 6 hit today? Please not 0 again..

"sya believes in draws" challenge DAY 2 ⭐️

Day 1 result: 1/4
Total PnL: +$36.92

England vs. Ghana saved the day with a 7x hit!

Today’s matches:
>🇨🇭Switzerland vs. 🇨🇦Canada- draw @ 32c
> 🇧🇦Bosnia vs. 🇶🇦Qatar - draw @ 18c
> 🇲🇦Morroco vs. 🇭🇹Haiti - draw @ 13c
> 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿Scotland vs. 🇧🇷Brazil - draw @ 17c
> 🇨🇿Czechia vs. 🇲🇽Mexico - draw @ 25c
> 🇿🇦South Africa vs. 🇰🇷Korea Republic - draw @ 25c

How many out of 6 today?👀

Cristiano Ronaldo scored 2 against the Uzbekistan and made me +$364, what a GOAT!🐐

But honestly, this prediction was too dangerous cause Uzbekistan team is the weakest that I’ve watched so far on World Cup..

Profit is profit, Messi is still better. https://t.co/RZZglM4S4G

"sya believes in draws" challenge starts today ⭐️

From now on, I’ll be predicting a draw in every remaining group stage match.

$10 on every game, no matter who’s playing.

Today matches:
> 🇨🇴Colombia vs. 🇨🇩DR Congo - draw @ 24c
> 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿England vs. 🇬🇭Ghana - draw @ 13c
> 🇵🇹Portugal vs. 🇺🇿Uzbekistan - draw @ 11c

How many of these 3 end in a draw?

MY FIRST COMBO HIT ✍️

Was a tough game for Algeria & Senegal made the score 2:3 just on 90+3..

Argentina + France picks were kinda chill.

So, here it is, my first x6 combo on @Polymarket https://t.co/R2XwFBoHkE

Argentina game went as planned and now I have a chance to finally hit my first combo

Hate to say it, but I’m on a 0/3 streak with combos for now.

All I need is a good game from Senegal & Algeria, plus Iraq attack to chill.

What can go wrong here? https://t.co/RekWd9lzyL

Polymarket whale who made $680k over the past week is predicting Argentina won’t win today.

If he’s right, he’ll cash out around $500,000 profit.

Sounds crazy, but I’m on his side here 🤷🏻‍♂️

$150 on Argentina to score under 2.5 goals with @DG3_terminal at 70c.

Many people underestimating Austrian team, you’ll see!

This trader made $686k since the World Cup started

Today he’s backing Belgium with $280k against Iran.

Honestly, I don’t fully agree with him here.

Can easily see Belgium struggling to break Iran’s defensive line, especially without Doku.

I’ll be analyzing this match with @Prophetzone before kickoff.

USA chances to win the 2026 World Cup doubled after their first game.

The 4-1 win over Paraguay made everyone believe this team is unstoppable, but I’m not fully buying it.

My pick today is Australia +2.5 at 85c with @DG3_terminal 

It should be a tough game for the US, because they’re not that good against low blocks.

I’m still testing combos on Polymarket

Today I chose a safer play, just 1.7x

First prediction is that Switzerland won’t score 3 goals*.

What can go wrong here?

Feels like another $15 profit for the WC account. https://t.co/tX1LaPdPEa

Trading journey on @Polymarket continues.

Managed to fast-click two deal signing markets last night.

Slowly shifting my focus from long conviction holds to quick plays like this.

All eyes on Israel & Lebanon now, let’s see how it plays out. https://t.co/MQFGUDhMW5

This trader is risking $13,988,965 to make $28,034

Honestly, that’s the first time I’m seeing someone bonding the market with 8 figs 💀

In fact, the outcome is basically decided already, and the market settles in 3 hours.

No sportsbook would let him cash out like this.. https://t.co/AZ5yoFIHBW

You’re underestimating Croatia today

England is the bigger name, but they still have too many problems and I don’t see a comfortable win here.

Croatia +1.5 at 69c looks like the most interesting outcome.

Keeping @Prophetzone open for news and lineup signals before kickoff, but my first read is Croatia spread.
